top_signals.title: Crypto industry braces for quantum computing threat
top_signals.summary: Threat to code that underpins bitcoin has moved ‘from theoretical to credible’, industry figures warn
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Iran proposes permanent toll for Strait of Hormuz shipping
top_signals.summary: Iran is in discussions with Oman to establish a permanent toll system for maritime traffic passing through the Strait of Hormuz, according to Iran’s ambassador to France, Mohammad Amin-Nejad. The proposed system would require ships using the strait to pay fees to cover costs related to navigation management and security provision. Amin-Nejad, speaking in a ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: NATO will spend hundreds of billions of dollars on defense, says Rutte, as Trump pledges 5,000 American troops to top spender Poland
top_signals.summary: "I am pleased to announce that the United States will be sending an additional 5,000 Troops to Poland," Trump said on Truth Social on Thursday.
